overview: After 14 years away, Hein returns to his home village on a remote island, only to discover that the close-knit community no longer recognises him. Suspecting him to be an impostor, they demand a trial to determine his true identity.
title: Trial of Hein

overview: Yearning for a specific feeling linked to adolescence, a young boy sets out in search of fulfillment and closure, meeting a friendly companion along the way. However, when additional scenarios present themselves, he is left to question what it is he truly is searching for.
title: Ecdysis

overview: Gugu, a black boy living with his grandmother, experiences memories and revelations when the old city where she lived returns.
title: Gugu's World

overview: Nurul was a loving mother who supported the family, supporting the household through hard work and prayer, and managing the warm and welcoming Empal Gentong Stall. Her passing shook the family, the stall fell silent, Qomar was trapped in loneliness, and her two sons only just realized the importance of a mother's presence. Without Nurul, family harmony crumbled, and the once-bright home lost its direction and hope.
title: Rumah Tanpa Cahaya

overview: In a retro-futuristic, tropical-punk twist on Dante’s Inferno, a group of misfits converges at Babel, a legendary dive bar that doubles as purgatory, where La Flaca—the city’s Grim Reaper—presides. Here, souls gamble years of their lives with her, daring to outwit Death Herself.
title: Rains Over Babel

overview: Set in a small town, this film tells the story of a caregiver tormented by deep loss/doubt after his wife dies following her vaccination.
title: #Spread

overview: Twenty-year-old blogger and extreme sports enthusiast Sasha Ustinov, considering himself a pacifist, avoids military service and goes to a remote village to visit his grandfather. For many years, his grandfather has been searching for the remains of soldiers who died during the Great Patriotic War near Rzhev—an activity that Sasha finds pointless and remote from his life. But a random accident changes everything, transporting him to a space where the past comes alive and ceases to be a textbook page. Caught in a strange time warp, Sasha encounters soldiers from the Great Patriotic War and realizes that his own future is now tied to their unfinished story. To escape the time loop, he must undergo a series of rigorous trials that will force him to understand the concepts of memory, duty, the price of courage, and love.
title: Спасти бессмертного

overview: Seventeen-year-old Sara is hiding a secret on a school trip. When the trip spirals out of control and Sara witnesses a classmate’s sexual assault, she and the girl seal a bond that will last forever.

Twelve-year-old Deniz plays freely with her best friend at their secret hideout. At school, while playing with boys, she’s pushed aside for who she is and fails to fit in with the girl group. In this quiet moment of growing up, her dream world takes on a different meaning.
title: Gravity

original_title: Sie glauben an Engel, Herr Drowak?
overview: Lena is a cheerful student who firmly believes in happiness and the good in people. As part of a social project, she is sent by the office as a writing coach to Hugo Drowak, who has long since lost his luck and lives alone in a run-down tower block.
title: You Believe in Angels, Mr. Drowak?

original_title: AURORA: What Happened to the Earth? Live From Mexico City
overview: Norwegian alt-pop artist AURORA plays her biggest ever headline performance at Mexico City’s Palacio de los Deportes as part of her What Happened to the Earth? Tour. Filmed live on Dia De Los Muertos (Day of the Dead), the arena is transformed into a space of spellbinding sound and light, and filled with fans in festive dress. AURORA’s ethereal voice is ever-captivating as she sings haunting ballads including 'Dreams' and 'Exist for Love' as well as fan-favourites 'Runaway', 'The Seed' and 'Churchyard'. Known for blending electronic pop with folk and vivid storytelling, AURORA’s performances are always immersive and emotional, and this concert – celebrating nature and the human experience – solidifies her as a beacon of originality and inspiration.
title: AURORA: What Happened to the Earth? Live From Mexico City

overview: Heather O’Rourke captured hearts as Carol-Anne in the Poltergeist films, a bright light destined for greatness. Her sudden passing at just 12 years old left the world stunned and searching for answers. She Was Here looks beyond the headlines and rumors to honor the girl behind the role: her life, her spirit, and the legacy she left behind.
title: She Was Here

overview: During the 1980s, the American journalist Edward Serotta documented the harsh realities and Jewish life in socialist Romania. The secret services clandestinely accompanied him on his journey. A photo essay from opposing perspectives.
title: Shot Reverse Shot

overview: A series of absurd situations and culinary catastrophes alternate between sincere laughter and bitter tears. And the big question remains: is the pursuit of the perfect reputation worth it, or does the recipe for true happiness lie somewhere else?
title: Brunch for Beginners

overview: Hassan, a 55-year-old Palestinian Uber driver, shuttles partygoers through endless Berlin nights. Amir, a young Israeli who is in danger of losing himself to these nights, becomes Hassan’s regular passenger when they find themselves bonded by heartbreak.
title: Where To?

overview: Blues musician Al Cook lives in an apartment filled with memories. Outside, the world carries on without him. But when his home is slated for demolition, out of the ruins of his existence, a long-forgotten dream suddenly resurfaces.
title: The Loneliest Man in Town

overview: A year in Berlin: Leonie wanders through the city and the texts of Anna Maria Ortese. Speaking with friends and translator Sigrid Vagt, she is also looking for the narrative threads of her own life. A film of reading shot in glowing, matter-of-fact 16mm.
title: Foreign Travel

overview: When Miles, a socially-awkward health freak, is dragged into a house party he never wanted, an unexpected connection with a stranger sparks a night that spirals into a life-altering turn of events.
title: Drop Dead Gorgeous

overview: The drag queens of the La Sirène à Barbe cabaret put on a grandiose show of song, circus and dance, the likes of which Dieppe has never seen before. Erwan, a local fisherman, is spellbound. He ventures into their world of joy and celebration and discovers, behind the costumes of the stage characters, tormented, lonely, over-sensitive human beings ready to do anything to carry this project as far as possible. It's a portrait of a small port town inhabited as much by gloomy daily lives as by extraordinary destinies.
title: The Bearded Mermaid

original_title: 斗破苍穹剧场版 双帝之战
title: 斗破苍穹剧场版 双帝之战

overview: "Violent Endeavors" is a critique film based on "The Last of Us" show and video game emphasizing and enhances the lack of violence found within the adaptation as opposed to a linear style of action in drama cinema. The short film operates on a alternate level of storytelling closely based off one of the major action sequences of The Last of Us story. "Violent Endeavors" seeks to blend drama and action genres into one seamless flow of cinematic storytelling without degrading the level of violence or action that's essential to the world.
title: Violent Endeavors

overview: A psychedelic docu-essay, inspired by Arthur Rimbaud’s visionary poem Une Saison en Enfer, in which the poet’s ghost travels through history, encountering revolutionary figures and queer ‘freaks’ such as Emma Goldman, David Wojnarowicz, and Marsha P. Johnson. These encounters form a multilayered collage that interrogates identity, the meaning of revolution, and the role of the artist in shaping radical histories and collective imaginaries.
title: Uchronia

overview: The Apocalypse of St. John invites viewers on an epic journey through the visions revealed to the Apostle John on Patmos. This cinematic experience brings the Book of Revelation to life through striking visuals, immersive sound, and powerful dramatizations that draw audiences deep into the apocalyptic narrative. Beyond its spectacle, the film offers clear and engaging explanations of each vision, illuminating their theological meaning through the lens of ancient Christian tradition. It presents Revelation not as distant symbolism, but as a living prophecy with profound relevance for our age. Blending drama, documentary insight, and faithful exegesis, the film guides viewers through the mysteries of the End Times and the great spiritual battle at the heart of the prophecy.
title: The Apocalypse of St. John

overview: 15-year-old Emma, pregnant after a rape, defies her repressive rural Protestant community to carve a path of self-determination, transforming trauma into a catalyst for emancipation while confronting the moral hypocrisy of the village and the spectre of World War II around her.
title: Silent Rebellion

overview: The story of the post-war life of a veteran of the Second Nagorno-Karabakh War.
title: The Dance of Triumph

overview: Three friends from Medan who have an Event Organizer (EO) called AIU-EO get a big project to organize a rich businessman's wedding, but instead get an unexpected mission from the bride-to-be to thwart the wedding itself.
title: AIU-EO: Macam Betool Aja

overview: The story of the post-war life of a veteran of the Second Nagorno-Karabakh War.
title: The Dance of Triumph

overview: Three friends from Medan who have an Event Organizer (EO) called AIU-EO get a big project to organize a rich businessman's wedding, but instead get an unexpected mission from the bride-to-be to thwart the wedding itself.
title: AIU-EO: Macam Betool Aja

original_title: Stallion y la Bola de Cristal
overview: In his dark, silent room, a secluded teenager sick with a burning desire casts a spell. As violent visions warp his reality, a bubble threatens to burst; something must break.
title: Stallion and a Crystal Ball

overview: After a chance encounter on the DC metro, Ryan and Julisa spend the next twenty-four hours discussing their hopes, dreams, and fears. Slowly but surely, they reveal more and more about themselves, and fall in love.
title: Step Back, Doors Closing

overview: In a community recently shaken by a local tragedy, 12-year-old João and his alcoholic father make a living from fishing. However, the effects of climate change on the business, the ghosts of their past and the father's increasingly erratic behavior could lead to their separation. It is in the next-door neighbors that João meets an unlikely family that could be his only hope for a different future.
title: Terra Vil

overview: A depressed, dysfunctional physicist accidentally sent back in time tries to fix her future by mentoring her troubled 14-year-old self: a whole-ass handful with her own mischievous agenda.
title: Displaced

overview: A man dies young. Funeral rites – yes; mourning – not so much. A death that stirs and shakes things up. A film that shows the violence of family relationships with uncanny subtlety and verve, the pendulum of void and solace.
title: Members of the Problematic Family

overview: The future. Winter. Space travel is no longer a dream. A lonely janitor tends the grounds of a dilapidated bankrupt film studio with only a former cat actor for company until he embarks on a romantic journey with a female player in a beautiful virtual world.
title: Light Pillar

overview: The adventure action film centers on a famous extreme sports blogger who, having arrived in Cuba, finds herself involved in the mysterious story of a document that disappeared many years ago, according to which America was supposed to return the Guantanamo base to Cuba. Both the special services and a serious businessman have been hunting for it for a long time. However, only her grandfather, former intelligence officer Leo Voronov, a retired KGB general, with whom she does not communicate, knows where this document is. In parallel with the action in our time, the film will also tell about the adventures of Voronov shortly before the Cuban Revolution in 1958.
title: Guantanamera

overview: Belgrade in 1993. The pent-up tension of uncertain times is released at a children’s birthday party. While the kids celebrate in the living room dressed up as Ninja Turtles, the adults discuss, flirt, smoke and drink in the kitchen.
title: Celts

overview: In July 2022, a forest fire broke out on Monte Gambarogno in Ticino, Switzerland. Wound Edges is my emotional response to this landscape, filmed on 16mm and hand-developed with the forest’s ashes. Each frame carries physical traces of the land’s memory, blending destruction with resilience. The soundscape—field recordings, burned wood, contact microphones on trees, and the presence of fire—echoes the forest’s wounds. A reflection on human impact, impermanence, and the haunting beauty of transformation.
title: Wounded Edges

overview: After mistakenly buying two right-footed shoes, a ten-year-old boy sets off across the countryside to find the missing left one. An unexpected journey of courage, friendship and self-discovery.
title: Atlas of the Universe

overview: Three siblings (Alya, Adam, and Azzam) desperate for money decide to rob their mother's savings. They consider it as taking the inheritance first. Their mother is devastated, and the siblings pretend to care by taking turns accompanying her. While they're together, a big secret is revealed, forcing them to decide whether to admit their mistakes before it's too late.
title: Titip Bunda di Surga-Mu

overview: In Vicenza, a beautiful Italian art city, a young wealthy couple joyfully welcomes the birth of a long-awaited daughter in the early 1980s. But the child’s face is disfigured by a red birthmark that covers half her face. This spot haunts the mother to the point that she rejects her responsibilities as a mother. The child’s aunt, a famous concert pianist, takes over her education, thus discovering her exceptional musical talent.
title: The Life Apart

overview: The focus of this documentary is on the work, telling our story from our self-titled debut through our most recent records and tours. It’s a tale about the grind, the craft, and the alchemy…and how we’ve managed to keep this thing going for more than a half century!
title: Little Feat: The Documentary

overview: A story set in a school on the outskirts of Rome.
title: Domani interrogo

overview: Dmitriy is a popular actor, a star of action films. The public loves him for his image of a macho with an impenetrable face. One day, Dmitriy receives an offer from a stern but very rich businessman from Siberia, Sergey, to star in a crime drama about the 90s in the lead role of a cold-blooded killer. Sergey offers Dmitriy's agent a fee 10 times higher than usual. They agree. During the filming, Dmitriy is accidentally wounded by a shot. After a simple operation, he is ready to return to the frame, but faces an unexpected side effect: now he constantly smiles, and any emotions are expressed with laughter. Dmitriy has no chance to stop filming and "upset" Sergey, who clearly knows firsthand what he is making a movie about.
title: Человек, который смеётся

overview: A teen flees her controlling mother, only to face abuse in a new relationship, forcing her to choose between escape or freedom.
title: Wreckage

original_title: Un été à la ferme - L'âge d'or
title: Un été à la ferme - L'âge d'or

overview: In present day East End, an aspiring novelist falls in love with a Ukrainian cleaner whilst his best friend attempts to rekindle his romance with a social climbing sex bomb.
title: La Bohème

overview: A visual and acoustic reflection about perception, deception, truth and the medium of film itself. Between visibility, irritation, structure and dissolution, a space arises for one’s own vision. An experimental film that wants to be experienced.
title: Flim Flam

overview: Joaquín is a man who, in the aftermath of Hurricane Maria, fights to save Casa Pura, the boutique hotel that once stood as his greatest pride. That fragile stability is threatened when his sister-in-law returns to the island with a buyer—and unexpectedly, a long-lost will that could change everything. From that moment on, a race against time begins to protect not just a property, but the emotional and family legacy that still holds him together.
title: Casa Pura

overview: When their city is placed under siege, the lives of a group of ordinary people are turned upside down, forcing each of them to confront impossible choices in pursuit of what they believe is survival in a war zone.
title: Chronicles from the Siege

overview: Get ready for comedic royalty as the Undisputed Queen of Comedy, Sommore, returns to Detroit for her 7th special, performing up close and personal at the Garden Theatre, recorded on June 28th.
title: Sommore: Chandelier Fly

overview: This is Taylor Tomlinson's fourth Netflix special, following Quarter-Life Crisis (2020), Look At You (2022), and Have It All (2024).
title: Taylor Tomlinson: Prodigal Daughter

overview: The journey begins in vibrant, spiritual yet harsh Kathmandu and continues towards the majestic Himalayas. Twenty-one-year-old Jamuna accompanies her younger sister on what could be their last trip to the mountains.
title: Goodbye Sisters

overview: A Tet 2026 movie.
title: Mùi Phở

overview: After losing her friend Yo, Anna builds a detailed 1/3-scale version of her friend's house. It is just big enough for Anna to squeeze into, and inside lives a puppet of Yo. When the pair first met, Yo was 73 and Anna 24.
title: Yo (Love is a Rebellious Bird)

overview: Pasha has never been in love, but he does have a nightclub he inherited. It's in debt. Pasha can't manage it, but he can't sell it either—it's all he has left from his parents. Pasha also has a friend, Lesya, who patiently waits for his feelings to finally thaw. And they thaw when Lesya introduces Pasha to her friend, Alisa. Alisa isn't responsible for those she's tamed. She will be the first to break Pasha's feelings, turning his life into complete madness.
title: Первая

overview: When Emily moves out of home, she unwittingly reactivates a generational curse that has laid dormant for 25 years. Dismissed as crazy by all those around her, she must reconnect with her ancestry to defeat the vengeful “giniirr” before it takes her life,as payment for her ancestors’ sins. Bringing a new First Nations spin to the horror genre, IT WILL FIND YOU brings a fresh take to a tried-and-true supernatural horror.
title: It Will Find You

overview: Finlay and Joe are processing the tragic death of their friend, Luke. But when Finlay's unique coping mechanism becomes too problematic to ignore, a long-avoided conflict forces a confrontation that will change everything.
title: Pavements

original_title: Dikkie Dik 2: Een nieuwe vriend voor Dikkie Dik
overview: On a winter's day, Dikkie Dik and Poes Muis discover something new: snow! But there is also a new neighbor: a big, noisy dog called Blaf. Brr, the cats don't like that!
title: Tummy Tom 2: A New Friend for Tummy Tom

overview: Steamboat Willie’s first mate, Minnie, goes on a killing spree when seeking revenge against the childhood bullies who tortured her as a teenager.
title: Minnie’s Midnight Massacre

overview: From a teenager’s suburban bedroom to the boardrooms of Silicon Valley, this is a story of a heartbroken father’s quest to uncover the truth behind his daughter's death and his fightback against how the most powerful corporations of the modern age operate.
title: Molly vs.THE MACHINES

original_title: Black Men in Uniform: The Untold Story
overview: Pata Seca  (1828), a man whose back bore the whip marks of his enslavers , whose eyes held the haunted memory of being forced to breed over 200 slave children in order to sustain his master’s plantation.  Men broken but unbowed, transformed from field hands into soldiers from the civil war to Vietnam.  This documentary weaves together authentic narratives from the 1800s, accompanied by original images and footage, highlighting the significant influence that Black men in uniform had in Hollywood and addressing ongoing relevant issues to date.
title: Black Men in Uniform

overview: Steve, A Final Student In The Midst Of His Busy And Busty College Schedule. As Chinese New Year Is Closer, His Longing Is Greater, But Everything Is Hindered By Time And Activities, Which Make Him Unable To Feel The Warmth Of Chinese New Year.
title: LOOK IT SIDE

overview: A female character born from code, LOAB leads us through six iconic horror eras from Nosferatu to Get Out: a prompted being, cursed by design. Whoever knows her becomes part of the algorithm; whoever resists will be punished. An AI meta genre essay.
title: The Valley where LOAB Lives

overview: A group of horror YouTubers called The Eyes visit Tanah Kalaknat, a cursed place where it's said no one can leave. Despite numerous prohibitions, their curiosity leads them there. Upon arrival, strange things begin to happen, and one by one, The Eyes members begin to experience life-threatening misfortune.
title: Taneuh Kalaknat

overview: Returning to her evacuated village to trace the past, musician Suna tries to get a confession from Bekir, a dementia patient she suspects of murdering her sister. In the process, the unexpected bond she forms with Bekir's rebellious daughter Fidan will both bring Suna closer to her family again and force her to confront the darkness within herself.
title: Hear the Yellow

overview: 15-year-old Sam embarks on a road trip with her older sister Dylan to meet the boy she fell for in a chatroom.
title: BRB

overview: While writing a screenplay for successful film producer Sally Kimmer, twin brothers Austin and Lee learn of their true sibling rivalry. As tensions rise, Sally finds herself having to prove herself worthy to her pushy boss Mr. Williams.
title: The Same Frame

original_title: WICKED WONDERLAND 5: THE TICK OF TIME
overview: When Quinni and her friends are pulled into the past, they must witness the heartbreak of Young Red and Young Tiana to realize that some things in time cannot be fixed—only forgiven.
title: WICKED WONDERLAND 5: THE TICK OF TIME

original_title: エヴァンゲリオン放送30周年記念特別興行
overview: Plot to be announced.
title: Untitled Evangelion 30th Anniversary Short

overview: La Maestra and Paula are the best swimmers in their team and best friends, until an incident at a party changes everything. La Maestra, intense and unstoppable, realises that something in her best friend has changed, making her sad. When the truth comes to light, the two are faced with an impossible decision: Paula wants to keep quiet about it, while La Maestra wants revenge. Their friendship, previously unbreakable, will be put to the test as never before.
title: Sad Girlz

overview: Karin, a female student who attends the most modern Islamic boarding school in Indonesia. The Islamic boarding school allows its students to use gadgets for learning such as cellphones or laptops. One day, suddenly there was a rumor that Karin spread a selfie photo of herself naked in her dorm room. Even though it was just a rumor, people believed the gossip so much that Karin was shunned by her friends. Assisted by her secret boyfriend, Affan, the two of them tried to find out the truth about this gossip. And if the photo really exists, who faked the photo and spread it?
title: Red Flag

overview: Édouard Bergeon immerses us in the life of Jérôme Bayle, a charismatic farmer from southwestern France and a national figure of rural life. With humor and tenderness, he paints a sensitive portrait of today’s French family farming and those who fight to keep it alive.
title: Rural

overview: Dreams Dreams Dreams...  Are they real?
title: Ima Chimmathe

overview: Set in the emotional ruins of the post-Soviet space, this film follows a trans woman through her second year after transition. Haunted by family, silence, and the remnants of her former self, she begins to break free. Thailand becomes her place of rebirth — not escape, but transformation. The film reclaims Nietzsche’s concept of the Overman — not as a cold superhuman ideal, but as a fragile, feminine figure shedding skin through pain, love, and spiritual resistance.
title: Pārcilvēks

overview: Bachir Bensaddek’s new drama starring Antoine Bertrand.
title: La Femme cachée

overview: The uninterrupted light trail of one year and ten months, condensed down to 20 minutes, filmed on a self-made camera. Daily rhythms accelerate, slowly at first, then more intensely. A structuralist film about transience.
title: Forever…Forever

overview: After a failed Hollywood ending, Taylor Fay struggles to get over her ex-boyfriend and embarks on an introspective odyssey,  re-evaluating their relationship, her attempts to move on and her understanding true love.
title: Taylor Fay

overview: When an ongoing apocalypse halts the production of Gabby's new film, she escapes to see her artist friend Tona in La Union, a former booming beach town and strategic site for a US military base.
A bumbling Priest and his hapless Cameraman are thrust into the world of exorcisms in order to save the soul of a young Girl from an existentially conflicted Demon.
title: Rite To Exorcise

overview: Caught in the crossfire of their parents’ divorce, Nina and Eli are torn between loyalty, anger and a longing to be seen. Through their mirrored perspectives the same story unfolds, revealing how love can fracture and still find its way.
title: A Family

original_title: Eric Church: Evangeline vs. The Machine Comes Alive
overview: Experience Eric Church’s groundbreaking Evangeline vs. The Machine exclusively in IMAX. Filmed over two electrifying, sold-out nights at The Pinnacle in Nashville, TN. this one-of-a-kind concert event captures the CMA Entertainer of the Year performing his eighth studio album front-to-back before reimagining fan favorites like “Desperate Man,” “Give Me Back My Hometown,” “Sinners Like Me,” “Mistress Named Music,” and “Springsteen.” Backed by a 6-piece band, 4-piece horn section, 4-piece string section, 8-piece choir, and powerhouse vocalist Joanna Cotten, Church transforms the stage into a thrilling fusion of country, rock, blues, and soul.
title: Eric Church: Evangeline vs. The Machine Comes Alive

overview: Ireland, 1977. An ambitious young farmer yearns for something bigger than himself....
title: Dóchas Nua

overview: Alcohol addiction is a constant in Pepa Lubojacki’s family. In an attempt to find a sisterly-brotherly way of dealing with it, text, long-term observation, beats and AI-animated photos are combined into an unflinching, yet loving form of disclosure.
title: If Pigeons Turned to Gold

original_title: La face cachée de la Terre
overview: Dimitri loves photographing friends, strangers, lovers. Over the years, images have slipped away from his sight. Behind his camera, he gathers light and bodies, inviting us to gaze toward the hidden face of the Earth.
title: The Hidden Face of the Earth

overview: Boys in Downeast Maine are shaped by the brutal winters, their harvesting of the ocean’s bounty and the rigid codes of their fathers. Bucks Harbor explores growing up in a community where a man’s worth is often defined by the strength of his back.
title: Bucks Harbor

overview: A series of interconnected stories centred around an old elevator, an assassin, his niece, and an elderly man with a dark past.
title: Going Up?

overview: On the evening of a total eclipse of the moon, seven close friends gather for a dinner party. One of the friends, a relationship therapist says that she is convinced that many couples would separate if they saw the messages on each other's phones. As the friends debate this contention, they agree - some of them reluctantly - to play a game. They will each place their phone on the table and they will share their messages and calls with the rest of the group.
title: Perfect Strangers

overview: Instead of finding a “proper” job, Alf, pushing 40, lives with his mum and drifts though Norrköping’s cultural scene. Chats & faces, routines & intuitions, local politics & everyday life – the intimate and the social, in black-and-white analogue images.
title: Doggerland

overview: Growing up without her parents, who had gone to work in the West, Flavia became a tough but distant teenager. The routine that keeps her safe and emotionally isolated is disrupted when two young children who have run away from home seek shelter with her.
title: On Our Own

overview: Cakra and Nilam are beset by mystical terrors ready to devour their souls. Fate brings them together with Malawangsa and Birsha, along with the emergence of Tribuana. Will they survive the unseen threat, or will it lead them to an even more terrifying age of madness?
title: Rajah

overview: The 2026 Elimination Chamber is an upcoming professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) and livestreaming event produced by the American company WWE. It will be the 16th Elimination Chamber event and will take place on February 28, 2026, in Chicago, Illinois. It will be held for wrestlers from the promotion's brand divisions Raw and SmackDown. The event is based around the Elimination Chamber match, a type of multi-person elimination-based Steel Cage match in which Wrestlemnia opportunities are at stake.
title: WWE Elimination Chamber 2026

overview: The history of THNG Tek-chiong family not only reflects the confusion and the pursuit of Taiwanese identity over generations, but also serves as a cautionary tale for the people living in Taiwan.
title: In Search of a Mixed Identity

overview: Between light, metal and silver, a collection of solidarity pins turns into an archive of another scale: spectres of exile and international struggle against Portugal’s fascist and colonial regime.
title: Filme Pin

overview: In a peripheral neighbourhood, where the rural and urban worlds meet, the houses of the first migrants who arrived after the post-war period coexist with the new blocks of the dormitory city, where the latest wave of migration is concentrated. This humble corner is now an authentic global village. Good Valley Stories is a sum of constructs, of social, generational and identity, urban and ecological conflicts, but it is also a calm and humanistic look at today’s world.
title: Good Valley Stories

overview: A documentary crew follows Ella Gible, a BYU student for 20 years, who refuses to graduate until she finds a husband.
title: BYU's Resident Cougar

overview: It's time for adventure! Who says kids can't save the world? Mysterious aliens have returned to Earth, so assemble your team! Get ready for all-new challenges, explore mysterious waterfalls, cross uncharted canyons, and traverse a magical rainforest. Together, the kids will be ready to go on a thrilling adventure!
title: Bear Kid: Super Hero

overview: Heike works at a cleaning company, where every day she has to handle her team’s struggles, the pressure of delivering a spotless job, and the need to keep clients and boss happy. When a powerful subcontractor threatens to withdraw his support if she does not provide more work for his team, Heike faces a difficult choice. To comply, she must sacrifice one of her own employees. As the pressure closes in, Heike must decide how far she is willing to go to meet the job’s ruthless demands.
title: I Understand Your Displeasure

overview: In a near-future Los Angeles where space travel is becoming common, a young couple faces their last day together after Lisa is selected by NASA for a life-changing mission. Torn between love and ambition, they try to make peace with the distance her choice will create. El Día Que Me Quieras explores love, solitude, and the sacrifices that come with chasing dreams.
title: El Día Que Me Quieras

overview: For 30 years, a doctor from Paris has maintained a friendship with a fisherman on Tristan da Cunha, the most isolated inhabited island in the world. Now he travels back one more time, with the plan to stay there for good.
title: Tristan Forever

overview: After a heated discussion between four couples, two teams are formed (girls versus boys) and a crazy game begins. The rules are simple: for a weekend, the girls have to do the boys' activities and vice versa, and each team organizes the other team's weekend in detail. However, what seems like a simple and fun game at the end of the week turns out to be a much more complicated situation.
title: In pielea mea

overview: In this 1940s romance-turned-thriller short film, a young doctor meets his new patient and is instantly infatuated with her kind heart, stopping at nothing to obtain it.
title: CRIMSON DESIRE

overview: Samaan, a young Christian man, works as a security guard in a residential building in downtown Cairo. Quiet and introspective, he spends his nights writing stories and chasing his dream of publishing his first novel. Beneath his calm surface, Samaan carries deep wounds—the lasting effects of chronic PTSD, rooted in the traumatic loss of his father, who was killed in a terrorist attack in Libya during Samaan’s childhood. One day, amid the noise and routine of the city, Samaan crosses paths with Fatima, a young Muslim woman. What begins as a simple encounter soon blossoms into an extraordinary friendship—one that slowly begins to break down the walls Samaan has built around his trauma.
title: Safe Exit

overview: A film letter from the director to her aunt, who was murdered by her partner. She talks about the aftermath of the femicide, her grief, the family’s persistent fear and how she has managed to break the silence to open a space for healing.
title: Miriam

overview: A man realizes he is being followed by a camera, he tries to get away, but it constantly pursues and catches him. He runs to escape it.
title: Le chemin et la fuite

overview: Seventeen-year-old Ni’er feels trapped between her monotonous daily grind at a petrol station and the weight of family expectations. A fleeting encounter with a female truck driver radiating freedom and self-determination sparks a quiet revolution within her.
title: Ni'er

original_title: Hasta que la celda nos separe
overview: A couple of criminals challenge both love and the law to achieve the wedding of their dreams. Liza, determined to stay in her country despite financial hardships, convinces her boyfriend Joseph to go through with a heist that Las Vejigantes, the crime syndicate he works for, had explicitly abandoned. What starts as a simple art gallery theft, quickly escalates into an unexpected marriage proposal, a chaotic series of heists, police chases, and a media frenzy.
title: Till' jail do us part

overview: In a land not their own, amid a dwindling forest, a family carves out a fragile bubble of tenderness – a fleeting garden of hope where love can still take root.
title: The Garden We Dreamed

overview: "Toymaker" lives hidden behind privilege and power: by day, he's a respected figure in the city; by night, he's a predator who commissions, tortures, and preserves his crimes on VHS tapes that his wife, Camila, edits for the black market. Carlos recruits the victims; a shadowy "director" orchestrates the sadistic fantasies without getting his hands dirty.
title: The Tape Inside

overview: After moving back to the Twin Cities, Travis struggles to accept his current circumstances. Hiding behind nostalgia, he looks to avoid the future and a potential terminal illness of a parent.
title: Small Talk

overview: Nine-year-old Milo lives in a remote Argentinian village where he studies the Malambo, a folk dance full of bravura. He is an excellent dancer, but Milo’s only desire is to escape the countryside on a train for the Buenos Aires of his dreams.
title: The River Train

overview: In the wake of a mysterious family death, a couple's night of mourning is interrupted by a strange delivery containing an antique dollhouse and a terrifying tale about its lone occupant.
title: JC Bratton's Dollhouse

overview: Starvation, suspicion and madness plague a group of 1846 settlers as they journey across the Kalahari under the eyes of two desert spirits.
title: The Trek

overview: A young couple on their honeymoon is forced to experience each other’s darkest desires. As the lines between reality and sanity blur, a sinister presence keeps them trapped in their bridal suite and tries to seduce them towards unbearable truths.
title: Nuptials

overview: In a quiet British seaside town, Santana, a troubled young woman desperate to escape her suffocating family, runs away with her volatile boyfriend Frank. The pair marry in a rundown coastal venue, hoping for a fresh start — but their new life is shattered when a mysterious car rams into them on a rural night road, killing Santana instantly and leaving Frank consumed by grief and obsession. Refusing to accept her death, Frank traps his former medical professor, Dr. Pret — a man secretly infatuated with Santana — and forces him to help reanimate her using a stolen voodoo ritual. As Frank’s desperation deepens, he manipulates and blackmails Pret into harvesting “perfect” body parts from Santana’s own family, driving both men further into depravity.
title: Bride of Frankenstein Awakens

original_title: NJPW The New Beginning In Osaka 2026
overview: The New Beginning in Osaka 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 11, 2026, at EDION Arena Osaka in Osaka, Japan, and was headlined by Yota Tsuji (c) vs. Jake Lee for the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship.
title: NJPW The New Beginning In Osaka 2026

overview: Decades in the making, Haile Gerima's sweeping survey of Italy's brutal colonial legacy in Ethiopia is a monumental reckoning with suppressed history. With a balladeer's spirit, Gerima forges an epic ballad of resistance, freedom and national pride.
title: Black Lions - Roman Wolves

overview: After about a decade apart, The Ark went on a reunion tour in 2022. Through extensive archival footage and new interviews, the film chronicles more than three decades of the band and sees them go from six outsiders channeling their sense of otherness into success and a major breakthrough.
title: We Were The Ark

overview: Fernando's 45th birthday dinner turns into a territorial war when his alpha-mom meets his empowered girlfriend. To survive the night, he must finally cut the umbilical cord or remain her "little boy" forever.
title: Basta Mamá

original_title: Joy Boy: A Tribute to Julius Eastman
overview: African American composer Julius Eastman’s music and voice take turns. Sparked by colonial and life history. Raw, radical, crystal clear. A multipart, flashy, transnational-collective performance by six artists. An homage.
title: Joy Boy: A Tribute to Julius Eastman

overview: Grand Slam Australia 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by All Elite Wrestling (AEW) that took place on February 14, 2026 at Qudos Bank Arena in Sydney, New South Wales, Australia.
title: AEW Grand Slam Australia 2026

overview: While on a romantic getaway to reconnect as a couple after her husband’s grueling exorcism, a devout wife must confront her fears that the ritual failed and her husband is still possessed.
title: In Sickness and In Health

overview: On an intergalactic singles cruise, Delfino, Zenf, and Rita confront their loneliness.
title: Cosmonauts

overview: On the day my grandfather’s spirit was to depart and enter his new home, I began searching for the traces he left behind through different visual forms.
title: Ghost of Home

overview: A day in the life of four students in what is considered the worst class in the history of the school, as they confront unscrupulous teachers, sex, drugs and a math test.
title: Grade 10D

overview: Decades after dying, a baby boomer finds herself navigating a brave new world when she occupies the body of a Gen Z teenager.
title: You're Killing Me

original_title: Chiến Binh Ô Nha: Cộng Sinh
title: Chiến Binh Ô Nha: Cộng Sinh

original_title: UFC Fight Night 267: Strickland vs. Hernandez
overview: UFC Fight Night 267: Strickland vs. Hernandez (also known as UFC Fight Night: Strickland vs. Hernandez) was a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship that took place on February 21, 2026 at the Toyota Center in Houston, Texas, United States.
title: UFC Fight Night 267: Strickland vs. Hernandez

original_title: Qu'est-ce qu'on va faire de toi ?
title: Qu'est-ce qu'on va faire de toi ?

overview: Dylan gets a nasty surprise on Halloween and uses an unorthodox method to fix it.
title: No Bueno

original_title: Qu'est-ce qu'on va faire de toi ?
title: Qu'est-ce qu'on va faire de toi ?

overview: At the end of the Great War, a soldier burdened with informing a mother of her son's death, faces an impossible decision... Tell her a noble lie, or the horrible truth?
title: The Hero

overview: A mysterious man rides the last midnight tram, visiting women with gold coins and false promises. As desire, illusion, and greed collide, he loses the one who loved him truly-and becomes trapped in his own haunting game.
title: The Last Tram

overview: After a rebellion is crushed by the rats in the sewers of Los Santos, the rats return to a mostly peaceful life until Rattakus is forced to make a difficult decision that will change the fate of every rat in Los Santos.
title: Rattakus

overview: When war erupts in Ukraine, three women from different worlds collide at the Romanian border: an Italian woman searching for her missing husband and unborn child, a Romanian mother fighting to save her daughter, and a young Ukrainian surrogate forced to choose between survival and motherhood. Blending documentary reality with fiction, the film explores resilience, sacrifice, and the fragile bonds that emerge in times of conflict.
title: Grounded (Between Borders)

overview: A Shanghai woman journeys alone to a rubber plantation in southwest China, where her late father was sent during the Cultural Revolution. As she searches for a mysterious woman, some strangers unexpectedly drift into her path.
title: Shanghai Daughter

overview: Rong Chen would like to keep her place in the recorder group, Shao Yu wants to give up playing. She asks him for tips, and by practicing together, they not only improve their skills, but also learn something much more important from each other.
title: Tutti

overview: A high school dropout and delinquent, Jie, falls in love with a quiet, speech-impaired high school girl, Guang, leading to a story of mutual growth and healing.
title: Be with You

overview: Rey, a middle school student in Tokyo, is on winter break from today. Gyu-ri, a Korean high school girl, comes to meet her father who works in Tokyo. Parents are busy, and the two are bored.
title: Rei's Winter Break

original_title: សែនឆ្ងាយ ក្បែរអ្នក
overview: Seventeen-year-old Sota from the vibrant Phnom Penh, is sent to a quiet rural town to finish high school. Struggling to fit in, she feels adrift, until she meets Viphu, a kind-hearted boy whose determination to uplift his community sparks a bond neither expected.  Together they discover friendship and love. But as graduation nears, ambition and circumstance begin to pull them apart. Misunderstandings deepen, silence grows, and their paths diverge.  Yet even as distance separates them, a question lingers: is their story truly over, or only waiting to begin again?
title: Far Away Close To You

overview: Mason is a 20-something college graduate grief stricken by his failed attempts at romantic love. He attends a Valentine’s Day party with his best friend Cheryl in hopes of reuniting with his long-time crush, Harvey. Missing his presence and questioning the existence of love, he gets intoxicated unbeknownst to the consequences that are soon to follow.
title: Saccharine Nightmare

overview: Few hours after their first meeting at a party, a girl and a boy are lying next to each other.
title: The Whispers

overview: Land Invaders is an 8-bit video game that reimagines the history and legacy of colonialism, letting players symbolically confront intergenerational trauma through arcade-style gameplay.
title: Land Invaders

original_title: Casting for a Film, Ihsan's Diary
overview: In Beirut, actors audition for a film based on a soldier’s diary written in Jerusalem in 1915. They interpret scenes, reflect on the First World War and the present-day, and explore longing, identity and memory.
title: Casting for a Film, Ihsan's Diary

overview: Ramsés begins to experience disturbing changes in his body and mind, unsettling shifts that disrupt his daily life. Soon he realizes he is no longer alone in his own skin: the demon Asmodeus has taken control. Under this possession, Ramsés is driven into a spiral of desire and violence, seeking out both men and women to consume through blood and sex, feeding the darkest temptations of the demon within. As reality and delusion blur, Ramsés struggles to hold onto what remains of his humanity while Asmodeus leads him ever deeper into a world of lust, horror, and destruction.
title: Consumido Hasta la Carne

overview: In the near future, the crew of the research vessel Orpheus embarks on a deep-space mission to investigate a derelict spacecraft drifting near the edge of a black hole. Upon boarding the ghost ship, they discover strange ancient relics and a sealed sarcophagus-evidence of a long-forgotten expedition that disappeared centuries ago. Dismissing the superstitions of one crewmember, the team brings the sarcophagus aboard the Orpheus for study. But as they journey back toward Earth, the crew begins to vanish-one by one-under mysterious and violent circumstances.
title: Dracula in Space

overview: An enigmatic, fluid actor embodies a mythical figure tied to Virgil's egg, blurring reality and fiction as he recreates a film about his own life, an homage to Patroni Griffi's Il Mare. Through encounters, passions, and visions evoking ancient cults and legends, the work becomes a sensual, unsettling tribute to Naples and its magical-literary heritage.
title: Egg

original_title: STARDOM in OTSU 2026 Feb. 〜ありがとうウカルちゃんアリーナ、私がスターダムの安納サオリです〜
overview: Stardom in Otsu 2026 Feb. ~Thank you Ukaruchan Arena, I'm Saori Anou from Stardom~ was a professional wrestling event held by World Wonder Ring Stardom on February 20, 2026, at Ukaruchan Arena in Otsu, Japan.
title: Stardom in Otsu 2026 Feb. ~Thank you Ukaruchan Arena, I'm Saori Anou from Stardom~

original_title: STARDOM in OTSU 2026 Feb. 〜ありがとうウカルちゃんアリーナ、私がスターダムの安納サオリです〜
overview: Stardom in Otsu 2026 Feb. ~Thank you Ukaruchan Arena, I'm Saori Anou from Stardom~ was a professional wrestling event held by World Wonder Ring Stardom on February 20, 2026, at Ukaruchan Arena in Otsu, Japan.
title: Stardom in Otsu 2026 Feb. ~Thank you Ukaruchan Arena, I'm Saori Anou from Stardom~

overview: Fantastique is a magic-realistic coming-of-age in Guinea-Conakry. We follow the 14-year-old contortionist Fanta, who juggles between care for her ailing mother, school, and what she loves the most: Training with the acrobatic circus Amoukanama, with the hopes of joining their next big tour. Trying to bridge all expectations, Fanta starts to doubt what she really wants, searching for her own voice.
title: Fantastique

overview: A feature film created to celebrate the 10th anniversary of the Armenian sitcom Full House, bringing the characters back together for a special cinematic event.
title: Ֆուլ հաուս. Վայրէջք

overview: Lili, a young girl, takes tender care of her beautiful cardboard house, until the landlord forces her out in the name of renovation and profit.
title: Three Thousand Five Hundred

overview: A love story between a Spanish conquistador and a Native tribal princess from the Hispaniola island.
title: Zumeca

overview: Alan, a shy boy, attends a party forced by his best friend Jesús. When he's forced to go to the nearest store for some caguamas, he finds himself facing zombies invading the streets. Now Alan must make a decision: submit to them or fight for his life and figure out how to get back to the party.
title: ¡Apocalipsis a la Zombie!

overview: Altmark is located in the northern part of the German region of Saxony-Anhalt. This area of the country is sparsely populated and rural, and is mostly defined by agriculture and a rather frugal architecture reminiscent of that of the Hanseatic cities. It's here that an extensive military site was built in the 1930s. It is used as a training area for the German army and also includes a garrison town, in which parts of the military corps reside. The site covers a surface area of 323 square kilometres. It is the third-biggest military area in Germany and the most modern in Europe.
title: Scenario

overview: A man chases a rebellious gust of wind across the hills as it creates chaos and music through the grassland.
title: Para atrapar el viento

overview: Bea is a 50 year old woman who is separating from her husband. The day she has to leave the house where she has lived for the last twenty years, she arrives at her house and finds everything upside down and one of the thieves sleeping in her bed. Denís is a 28-year-old trans man who, despite having studied a career, struggles with job insecurity and lack of opportunities. After spending three days together, each of them must continue on their own way. When they resume their lives, they are no longer the same.
title: The Dashed Lines

overview: The investigation of a seemingly ordinary murder in the wilderness confronts operative Nyurgun Vasiliev with a difficult moral choice: to follow the letter of the law or to show human compassion. This dilemma becomes the main test for the hero, revealing new facets of his character.
title: Invisible Paths. Redemption

overview: In the second installment of Sennott’s yearly releases of the Inflatable Christmas Slasher series, a mayoral candidate stuck in a media dilemma and a homeless rapper somehow entwined with him must stop the evil that is The Bean, the player character from Fall Guys, before Christmas Day in this absurd parody slasher.
title: Fall Dies

overview: In mourning, Anat Even began travelling with a camera along the Gaza Strip after October 7 – again and again. Striving to show the reality of this painful border. Trying not to look away. An essay about questions of causality and responsibility.
title: Collapse

overview: After her mother’s death, Nao retreats to a Zen temple to wrestle with grief. Blending family archives, hand-drawn animation and performance art, this seductively meditative documentary explores suffering, and the gentle art of transcending it.
title: Masayume

overview: Renowned composer György Kurtág's journey through the key places and collaborations that shaped his work, capturing the transformation of emotions into music with world-class musicians in a cinematic exploration of his musical world.
title: Kurtág Fragments

overview: Four wraithlike figures of different ages and pasts, haunted by memory, drift along Nanjing's wintry riverbanks. They share an abandoned ruin where talk turns to poetry, painterly pauses, instrumental reveries and the unabashed group therapy of karaoke.
title: Panda

original_title: Henry is a Girl Who Likes to Sleep
overview: The filmmaker writes a letter to her cat, Henry. She is looking for a soft and tender place to inhabit – a quiet refuge of warmth to retreat into when the world becomes too loud. An ode to our captive pets and the intimate worlds we build together.
title: Henry is a Girl Who Likes to Sleep

overview: A Guadalajara teen explores his identity between friendship and desire. During the local church festivities, this search puts his relationship with his grandmother at risk.
title: When I Get Home

overview: HOUSE 4 documents a year in the life of inmates at Berlin´s youth prison. With exceptional access and the trust of both prisoners and staff, the film follows its protagonists as they undergo mandatory therapy. Does this institution succeed in changing the paths of these young men? House 4 holds up a mirror to the youth prison systems of Western social welfare states.
title: HOUSE 4

overview: With a taxidermy parrot and pistol in hand, Praxi, breaks into the home of a mute spiritual guru who trapped his lover’s soul inside the parrot years ago. Praxi must convince the guru’s estranged daughter to guide her father in freeing his lover’s soul in this darkly comedic tale of love and the afterlife.
title: The Old Man and the Parrot

original_title: Mark Vigeant: The Best Man Show
overview: A best-man speech that goes totally off-the-rails where the audience gets to play the wedding party.
title: Mark Vigeant: The Best Man Show

overview: Blind and low-vision kids take control of the cameras and capture their own experiences at the annual Braille Challenge — a weekend of high-pressure competition and raw coming-of-age moments.
title: Brailled It

overview: Anton and Diana, a couple on the verge of divorce, decide to save their relationship with the help of the innovative KOHAI program. It combines artificial intelligence, augmented reality, and a romantic weekend with perfect humanoid robots.
title: KOHAI

original_title: Ghosts In York: Truth or Tourist Trap
overview: We investigate the paranormal in the historic city of York.
title: Ghosts In York: Truth or Tourist Trap

overview: Charlie is Not a Boy is the tale of a hushed soul, bound to a crumbling household in an allegorical America. With a perverted butcher for a father and a mother frozen in a quiet, catatonic spell, Charlie seeks solace in the whimsical world of his eccentric grandmother. As his safe haven unravels, Charlie navigates the hostile worlds of home and the military, caught between his authentic self and the masks he must wear.
title: Charlie Is Not a Boy

overview: After his best friend’s mysterious and sudden death, a troubled teenager spirals into a desperate search for meaning testing the limits of his own body and mind as he grapples with grief, family dysfunction and the nature of water.
title: Starter

overview: A Catholic college student wants to join a coven, so she goes to a chapel and performs a ritual in hopes of summoning the devil. Where she can then perform the Osculum Infame and be initiated!
title: Osculum Infame: The Shameful Kiss

overview: After the passing of her last living relative, an astronaut travels across a sterile universe to a hostile planet believed to have a psionic egg with the ability to restore life. However the closer she gets the more aggressive the egg and the planet become.
title: The Last Egg

overview: In English, we say “rich, richer, the richest”. In Yiddish, we say “Rach (which means rich), Miè Guizoukt (which means: may it happen to me), A Ganèf (what a thief!)”. According to the director, this film will almost make you Jewish.
title: Les juifs riches

overview: "No Refunds" is a visceral, tangled descent into the transactional dynamics of intimate encounters, told through the language of bodies, sheets, and reflections, where the purchase of queer sex work is laid bare. As the filmmaker simultaneously takes on the roles of client and audience, the boundaries between documentary and performance fade, unraveling the artifice at the heart of sex work and the act of filmmaking.
title: No Refunds

overview: A Short Film by Rylee Zapotoschny.  A High School student’s mundane routine replayed through a dream sequence.
title: Always Returning

overview: Horror Shot-Film
title: Granny ( Short 2026 )

overview: Two drifters embark on a journey which puts them into contact with a series of strange individuals.
title: Roadkill & Dirtbag

overview: A man suffers a moral crisis after discovering a bag of stolen religious artifacts.
title: GREED

overview: In the arid Brazilian hinterland, girls play poised between their mothers’ difficult pasts and fantastic dreams for the future. In a place where men are still seen as giants compared to women, the girls cross the threshold from childhood into adolescence.
title: The Fabulous Time Machine

overview: When his van breaks down, a recently released convict tears through the streets of LA, colliding with everyone in his path in a desperate attempt to register on time as a sex offender.
title: Ten Will

overview: “Together” follows a quiet young man who finds comfort in the gentle rituals of a café, where love blooms in silence and familiarity. In the warmth of repeated moments, he holds on to a presence that feels real, even if the world around him never sees it. It’s a tender story of longing, memory, and the kind of love that lives deeply inside — whether shared or not.
title: Together

overview: While making a film about the Israeli-Palestinian war, an Iranian filmmaker is thrust into it himself. He is forced to flee Tehran with his family, and his political essay transforms into a twelve‑day diary of survival, exile and identity.
title: Fruits of Despair

overview: In an unnamed small town, a local baseball team prepares for the decisive game of the season. Among the players is Valentine — shy, quiet, and struggling to fit in among his loud teammates, in a world ruled by strength, competition, and unspoken rules. His attention is drawn to David, a carefree rebel who mocks everything and lives by his own code. What begins as an ordinary day on the field slowly transforms into an unexpected journey beyond the limits of expectation and self-control. After a crushing defeat comes a drunken night of confusion, excess, and one reckless idea that takes a dangerous turn. Everything culminates in a chaotic brawl over a trophy that has long ceased to be just a sports prize.
title: Strike Out, Dude!

overview: A family taboo, a missing story. Using 25 photos and the cold readings of artificial intelligence  against his mother’s warm memories, a nephew reconstructs the life of Michele, an uncle lost to  HIV and heroin in 1980s–90s Italy, exploring memory, the value of images, and what remains  unspoken.
title: The Most Beautiful Man in the World

overview: A wildly funny family comedy about a guy who sells his soul for six wishes so he can reach the one he truly loves.
title: Try Again

overview: After a concert, an aspiring triangle player is invited to an orchestra’s private after-party.
title: Play For Us

overview: Behind a struggling filmmaker stands a wife holding a marriage on the edge of collapse. When some hidden truths surface, her quiet endurance is tested beyond its limits.
title: The Wife

overview: A filmmaker's film shoot is canceled, and he sets off in search of what remains of it, elsewhere, accompanied by another actor. What they seek together is no longer just a film, but a reflection on the stories that are forbidden and those that are reclaimed.  Through their exchanges, the boundary between cinema and life blurs, and the film becomes a space of intimate resistance, where thinking, desiring, and speaking are one and the same.
title: Taxi moto

overview: Saida moves between the roles of teacher, daughter, translator and fixer like a train on its tracks. As her boss looms closer, she must decide whether to continue supporting the system or vanish into a world of her own making.
title: Yuragim

overview: FOX Sports has announced a new NASCAR documentary, “We’ve Lost Dale Earnhardt”, which will premiere on FS1 following the Daytona Duels on February 12.  The documentary revisits the death of Dale Earnhardt Sr. and examines the ripple effects that continue to shape the sport 25 years later.
title: We’ve Lost Dale Earnhardt

overview: Gilberto and Jacira promised to grow old together – for better, for worse, for richer, for poorer, in sickness and in health. Till death them do part.
title: If I Were Alive

overview: David gains possession of a box that answers all of life's questions. But when he opens it, he may have gotten more than what he asked for.
title: Box

overview: Starting from a hotel in Addis Ababa built by Emperor Haile Selassie, Ruth Beckermann explores a place both familiar and foreign to her. Archive footage and conversations on the ground combine personal reflections with the histories of Ethiopia and Europe.
title: WAX & GOLD

overview: Through never-before-seen archival footage and first-hand accounts of those who knew him best, the film traces Archbishop Desmond Tutu’s rise as the voice of the oppressed, guided by faith, hope and an understanding of the power of forgiveness.
title: Tutu

overview: Kirgiz horror movie.
title: Game

overview: On a sweltering summer day, Bianca feels unseen by her parents. Then an unexpected encounter with her favourite female actor, Billie King, helps her to find herself. A tender, imaginative tale about dreams and carving out a space for yourself in life.
title: Everyone's Sorry Nowadays

overview: An infertile couple's plumbing issues are rooted in an evil right below their feet.
title: Our Plumber

original_title: Before I Turn Off the Lights
title: Before I Turn Off the Lights

overview: On a school bus ride that feels both endless and fleeting, Agastya wrestles with identity, guilt and unspoken emotions when his best friend chooses to sit elsewhere.
title: Abracadabra

overview: Dreaming of Carhartt is a playful and introspective short film that follows Soren, a wide-eyed dreamer whose obsession with a Carhartt jacket pulls him into a dream world where memory, imagination, and reality intertwine. As Soren loses himself in musical sequences and personal identity, the film becomes both a critique and a celebration of brand culture.
title: Dreaming Of Carhartt

overview: In 2017, young Mapuche Rafael Nahuel was killed by police in the Patagonian forest. Site visits, court proceedings – the film unites the elements involved in solving the crime. Meticulously observed: the struggle for civil rights and narrating history.
title: Forest up in the Mountain

overview: After the full-scale invasion of Ukraine, many people in Russia faced a brutal choice: prison, the army – or exile. Margarita, Yuri and their friends are caught in the crosscurrents of history, with no way to return home, but also no place where they feel truly welcome.
title: A Russian Winter

overview: Set against a 1971 southwest, two men are forced to transport a mysterious bag across the desert. As the two begin their trek, the journey blurs into a haze of guilt, paranoia, and supernatural terror.
title: There's Something in the Bag

overview: In Mosul, a city devastated during the battle for liberation from the Islamic State, the fight to heal and preserve its identity, culture, and art is not over. Three men refuse to let Mosul remain in ruins. A city with 8,000 years of history, struggling to reclaim its soul through those who refuse to let it fade into oblivion.
title: The Lions by the River Tigris

overview: A girl tries to do anything in her (clumsy) hands to win her one true love.
title: The Circus Of Love

overview: Novice Fyodor accompanies father Pyotr on an official mission to the Polar Urals. Ahead of the missionaries is the farthest northern camp, which the locals cautiously call "the edge of the earth." And travelers are not at all welcome here.
title: Цинга

original_title: UFC Fight Night 268: Moreno vs. Kavanagh
overview: UFC Fight Night: Moreno vs. Kavanagh (also known as UFC Fight Night 268) was a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship that took place on February 28, 2026, at the Arena CDMX in Mexico City, Mexico. A flyweight bout between former two-time UFC Flyweight Champion Brandon Moreno (also former LFA Flyweight Champion) and Asu Almabayev was scheduled to headline the event. However, Almabayev withdrew due to a hand injury and was replaced by Lone'er Kavanagh.
title: UFC Fight Night 268: Moreno vs. Kavanagh

overview: 15 years after 3 bizarre murders shook a small provincial town, a team of documentary filmmakers revisit the case, confronting theories of a satanic cult, local conspiracies, and the terrifying possibility of a killer still on the loose.
title: THE SAMCA FILE

overview: A young woman tries to grieve by emptying her deceased mother's house.
title: Final Sale

overview: The main characters are a grandfather and his grandson, who suffers from agoraphobia. In an attempt to help his grandson, the grandfather puts his life and the boy's life in danger, and now the fate of the family depends on whether the boy can cope with his phobias and the Siberian taiga.
title: My Grandfather

overview: At midnight, two lab assistants study an unknown substance using machines and procedures that are unclear to us. They pursue knowledge through the strict logic of the laboratory. As exhaustion settles in, one of the assistants brews Turkish coffee for the other, and the night shifts. The process becomes a fortune-telling, and the scientific gaze gives way to intuition. Moving from analysis to foresight, the two women imagine another method of knowing; a space where rational inquiry and intuitive perception coexist.
title: The Weary Hours of Two Lab Assistants

overview: Alias is a small figure who dares to ask big questions. He is brought to life by a boy using scissors, glue and a lot of imagination. The boy wants to tell his story, but without others knowing who he is. His dad did something wrong and is in prison. Together, Alias and the boy go in search of answers. Is dad a crook? Is feeling sorry enough? And when will dad come home?
title: Dad = (not) Bad

overview: An intimate portrait of the Turner Prize-winning artist. As the boundary between reality and performance blurs, the shifting relationship between filmmaker and subject calls into question who is actually making the film.
title: Douglas Gordon by Douglas Gordon

overview: Three down-on their luck graduates struggling to find their place in Glasgow become embroiled into a shape-shifting alien conspiracy to take over the job market and destroy Scotland.
title: Welcome to G-Town

original_title: Josh Groban: An Intimate Evening at The Union Chapel
overview: Filmed in the intimate and historic setting of London’s Union Chapel, Josh Groban: An Intimate Evening at The Union Chapel captures the acclaimed vocalist at his most personal and powerful. Shot in November 2025, the concert film showcases Groban performing many of his most beloved songs alongside new material, all reimagined within the chapel’s soaring acoustics. The film highlights Groban’s extraordinary voice, emotional range, and deep connection with his audience.
title: Josh Groban: An Intimate Evening at The Union Chapel

overview: Music video for the song Disgust by Monoworld.
title: Disgust

overview: Sakit, the father of three daughters, cannot accept that they have already grown up and reached the age to start a family. For him, his daughters are still little children. When Sakit finds out that his eldest daughter Lala and his middle daughter Jala have someone they love, he cannot find peace. Instead of accepting the prospective sons-in-law, Sakit begins to put them through increasingly difficult and funny trials, one after another. Caught between being a father and being a father-in-law, Sakit tries both to protect his daughters and not to stand in the way of love. At the same time, he himself is still being tested by his father-in-law, Vidadi.
title: Son-in-Law VS Father-in-Law

overview: Emma is certain she's happy. She has a successful career, a loving boyfriend, wonderful parents, and is talented, funny, and smart. Until she unexpectedly and 'voluntarily' ends up in the psychiatric ward of a hospital. A short circuit? A burnout? She thinks this must be a huge mistake. Because she's a perfectly normal person. Right?
title: Honestly, I'm Fine

overview: Y-Concert by YeaH1, the 10-hour music festival for 55 artists.
title: Y-Concert

overview: A young woman feigns control in a candy coated ice cream vomit fever dream of a relationship.
title: Sick Thoughts Don’t Help!

overview: Two sisters returning to their family home after their mother's death, only to confront the monsters they accidentally conjured with a Ouija board.
title: They Wait In Shadows

overview: Thirty years of war, seven million displaced, ten million dead. A plunge into the chaos of the city of Goma, capital of North Kivu in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
title: Enough is Enough

overview: A girl left for dead gets devoured by forest spirits.
title: Hungry Hollow

overview: An anthology feature film exploring contemporary Black existence through the Pan-African flag
title: Three Colors: Pan-African

overview: Loneliness is an appeal to your Self. Loneliness is the deafness to outer responses. Loneliness is a mute confession.
title: Koroviy Val

overview: In 2021, despite all travel restrictions, Kārlis found a way to continue his journey around the world, and after rowing across the Pacific Ocean, he would set off across the next waters. After returning to Asia, he rowed across the Indian Ocean and then cycled more than 5,000km across Africa, arriving on April 4, 2024, at the same pier where he began his journey in 2016 - in Luderitz, Namibia.
title: With Love From The Ocean

overview: A depressed man decides to finally get out of bed, except his bed won’t let him.
title: HERE WE ARE AGAIN

overview: Following the accidental death of his brother, a cowardly young knight pleads with the Angel of Death, in the hopes of bringing his brother back.
title: A Coward's Plea

original_title: The Making of De Jeugd van Tegenwoordig
title: The Making of De Jeugd van Tegenwoordig

overview: In the remote Siberian Arctic, an Indigenous Sakha scientist descends into the depths of the melting permafrost. Searching for an ancient creature, he makes his way through the dangerous, claustrophobic caves to the mythical realm of the Underworld.
title: Chuuraa

original_title: ATHOS Au coeur de la Patrouille de France
title: ATHOS Au coeur de la Patrouille de France

overview: We follow TALENSSS, the disgusting diva sweet transvestite from transexual Carcaixent during one of the most difficult stages of her shitty life.
title: TALENSSS and The Angry Inch

overview: A realm of light and shadow blending with sound textures. Moving images and material collages create a dreamlike landscape, awakening something undiscovered and untamed.
title: Metanoia

original_title: We Are Making a Film About Mark Fisher
overview: A cinematic experiment exploring the continuing relevance of the late theorist’s ideas on capitalism, culture, and the future.  Blending documentary, performance, and hauntological fiction, the film follows Parkins — a time-slipped character — through ghostly landscapes and digital spaces, tracing Fisher’s thought from the 1990s to our algorithmic present.
title: We Are Making a Film About Mark Fisher

overview: Six girlfriends, gathered around a festive table, unexpectedly discover they are all in love with the same man, who goes by different names and changes his personality and image to suit each of them. Who is he and what does he want from them? The friends band together and devise a plan to expose and punish him. A perfect date night movie for all lovers, with an engaging drama where the antihero becomes the hero, and true love conquers all obstacles and prejudices.

original_title: Cảm Ơn Người Đã Thức Cùng Tôi
title: A Little Dream of Me

overview: Maono Mzimi is a 30-minute 16mm and digital hybrid performance in which loss is explored through space and motion.
title: unbroken spaces of vision

overview: A brave young soldier, Trey Simmons, just 31 years old, is putting everything on the line to unveil the dark schemes lurking within the shadowy corners of a secret government agenda — one that involves the horrific realities of child trafficking, abduction, and abuse on a global scale, concealed within underground tunnels, military installations, and secluded private islands. Trey's mission in life is clear: to uncover the truth behind what some might dismiss as mere 'conspiracy theories,' yet he has seen firsthand the dreadful and atrocious acts that have long been hidden from the world. Seeking methods to shield himself, particularly as the sole survivor, he strives to amplify the voices of the unheard and bring clarity to the unresolved.
title: Where are the children?

overview: When Camille, a teenager with Down’s syndrome, auditions for a dance troupe, her sister Agathe discovers the quiet cruelty of prejudice – and the fierce love that fights back.
title: That's My Sister

overview: Each winter in Luzón, a remote village in Castilla-La Mancha, an ancient ritual awakens. Cloaked in soot, horns, and bells, villagers vanish into the shadows, becoming devils. An immersive experience, a black-and-white journey into the sounds, breaths, and trembling rhythms of a timeless pagan trance.
title: An Unholy Dance

overview: When sound, abstraction, and LiDAR imaging awaken Metro Atlanta’s animist unconscious, a displaced landscape is compelled to reckon with its histories of erasure as Black life resurfaces through animist persistence and collective splintering.
title: ANIMIST UNCONSCIOUS

overview: Despite the deep traces of trauma caused by sexual violence and torture at the hands of Russian troops, Ukrainian women survivors are uniting to break stigma and silence, transforming their testimonies into a powerful form of resistance.
title: Traces

overview: Encore screening from Paris Opera Ballet of 'Giselle', the ultimate romantic ballet.
title: Paris Opera Ballet: GISELLE

overview: A hard-edged dad just wants to survive another birthday party, but when a try-hard super dad won’t take “no” for an answer, things get real awkward…real fast.
title: Seaweed Snacks

overview: Following the 2013 Maidan Revolution in Kyiv, A Rising Fury takes viewers to the front lines of a growing conflict between Ukraine and Russia to witness firsthand a war that is tearing country and family apart.
title: A Rising Fury

original_title: Empire of Darkness - La Grande Histoire du Cinéma
overview: From the 1st projection to the newest technology IMAX and 4DX, we will travel trough the history of french theaters, asking questions about technological developments throughout history, and finally, the hoped-for future of movie theaters and how they envision themselves in 20 years.
title: Empire of Darkness - The Great History of Cinema

overview: An awkward first date takes a turn for the worse when things get too personal.
title: unHinged

overview: A film about the gift of re-membering what was dis-membered by the colonial project. Dreamscapes, ritualised practices of sharing and ancestral rhythms render visible the previously invisible lines that once held communities and ecosystems in sacred balance.
title: Yurugu - Invisible Lines

original_title: Fiz um Foguete Imaginando que Você Vinha
overview: Fifty-something Rosa, lying in an MRI scanner, is prompted to summon a happy memory. She plunges into a meandering, subconscious road trip with her indomitable mother, both queer, where wild imagination becomes a tender, unruly form of therapy.
title: I Built a Rocket Imagining Your Arrival

overview: Dembe died of an overdose in the distant metropolis of Dakar. His father refuses to bury him in the family graveyard in the village, believing that his soul has become “impure”. Dembe’s mother decides to take matters into her own hands.
title: Souls of Fouta

overview: A lonely tenant finds a man in his bathroom ceiling fan.
title: The Fan Man

original_title: There Is A Woman In The Attic
overview: As shown as part of the LEE MILLER curation at Tate Britain with Girls In Film.  There Is A Woman In The Attic is a personal response to seeing the LEE MILLER exhibition at Tate Britain. It is a reflective piece exploring the feeling of inequality about knowing details about an artist or celebrities personal life after viewing their work, yet knowing they don’t and might never know you. In retracing Miller's own footsteps and questioning this power balance and relationship, the film poses an examination into identity and asks how well we can really know a stranger as well as how well do we know ourselves.
title: There Is A Woman In The Attic

overview: A six-week surf therapy programme sets schoolgirl Sana free.
title: In Between Waves

overview: We lived a secret life, hidden from your husband--a romance of furtive meetings and a future eternally postponed. We stole a week to be together in France; I still could never film us directly, but in the textures and details of the city, I captured the tragic absences of our affair, infinite in the shadows, impossible in the open. Years later, I found these grainy old videotapes--faded like memory, feelings raw but transformed--and composed a love letter to who we once were, what we could’ve been.
title: _____ in Paris

overview: A unique legal battle between indigenous peoples unfolds on film: Two Sami groups face each other in court, locked in an insoluble conflict that has its roots in the state's forced displacements over a hundred years ago.  How can one agree on a future when the past is lived so differently? Over a hundred years ago, the state forced Northern Sami to move into Southern Sami territory. Today, their descendants are fighting in court for land, reindeer herding, and the right to be Sami. The film shows how state actions continue to divide a people, and how the past continues to shape their future.
title: Sámi vs. Sámi

original_title: Meer ku'j d'r niet van maek'n
overview: In the early 1990s, a joke in a Dutch pub in Tuk unexpectedly grew into a nationwide hit. Mannenkoor Karrespoor suddenly found itself on major stages, on television, and on the radio. For the down-to-earth men from the Kop van Overijssel, it was a strange new world—one they tried to navigate while keeping both feet firmly on the ground. When money and success enter the picture, the men face a dilemma: how do you make sure that a joke that spiraled out of control is still something to look back on fondly 35 years later?  The film weaves together rich archival footage with the present day, as the choir members reflect on their extraordinary journey at their regular table in Café De Karre. The viewer joins Mannenkoor Karrespoor and follows them as they write a new song for the first time since the 1990s and prepare for their anniversary show.
title: Meer ku'j d'r niet van maek'n

Caught between labels of extremist and revolutionary, anti-national and patriot, his journey becomes a gripping character study of belief, survival, and an unbroken spirit that refuses to die.

title: The Sublet

overview: a journey through spiritual gateways filmed in the Dine'tah
title: Portals

overview: a journey through spiritual gateways filmed in the Dine'tah
title: Portals

overview: So much for a world of total accessibility: the inmates in Farina Mietchen’s documentary can only communicate precariously, and access is unevenly distributed between those on the inside and those they wish to contact. “If you can’t reach me,” a former inmate reminds his Turkish friend, who is still in jail, “try again. I can’t call you back.” Such are the rules in the business of the inmate telephone system. Mietchen listens to her anonymized protagonists as they talk on the phone, watch crime shows together, and make plans for their next visit, while she herself fills out visitation requests. The film’s error-prone DV format reflects this world of fragile communication, so out of step with the times—as is, one might argue, the entire prison system that necessitates it.
title: Hinterlegte Nummern

overview: Ruweena and Zoe were best friends - well, sort of. Actually, it was more like Ruweena followed Zoe everywhere, from lunchtime to after school and even to uni, while Zoe kind of… tolerated her.  Then, six years ago, Ruweena disappeared and left Zoe all alone. Zoe likes it better this way. Doesn't she? So why is it that she still keeps the single bed they used to sleep in - why is it that she lets Ruweena kiss her the moment Ruweena reappears?  And why does it feel as if there's something terribly, awfully wrong with the bed they used to call theirs?
title: Oxpecker

overview: After a random shooting left him paralyzed, Chris Rivera rediscovered life through the Triad Trackers, a wheelchair basketball squad that redefines success beyond wins and losses.

During practice, Paula re-injures her shoulder and is forced to use steroids to recover faster and rejoin the team. As her mother's Alzheimer's worsens, Paula must endure emotional abuse from her mother and the absence of her father. Paula manages to recover in time for another chance at the team, but this is only the beginning of her new problems.

overview: As a singer and musician in This is pop, Zélien Zénon, Calypso and now as a duo with Sophie Massa for the synth-pop sound of À trois sur la plage, Liza Bantegnie, from Douarnenez in Brittany, founded the Cartelle label with Margot Oger in 2022. Dedicated to today’s female scene, and more broadly to artists from gender minorities, trans or non-binary people, it has released a number of eclectic compilations ranging from pop and post-punk rrriot to electro and noise. Her taste for searching out, adventure and dance will underpin her explosive mix at 360 for Travelling 2026 where she will perform as Liza Liza !
